application.title: Registration
application.subtitle: Please select the program you are registering for and fill in the required information.
application.schoolOnlyDesc: July 20–24, 2026 · Submit resume and transcripts (unofficial transcripts such as web printouts or screenshots are acceptable if official ones are unavailable) (.zip)
application.schoolAndWorkshopDesc: July 20 – August 28, 2026 · Submit resume, transcripts (unofficial ones acceptable if official unavailable), and 1-page English research statement (.zip)
application.hotelBookingDesc: A limited number of rooms at a negotiated rate are available (Fuyi Fashion Hotel, near PKU Southwest Gate). Please indicate in your application.
application.fileUploadSchoolHint: Filename format: 暑期学校申请材料-SchoolName-YourName.zip · Must contain resume and transcripts (unofficial transcripts such as web printouts or screenshots are acceptable if official ones are unavailable)
application.fileUploadWorkshopHint: Filename format: 暑期学校和讨论班申请材料-SchoolName-YourName.zip · Must contain resume, transcripts (unofficial ones acceptable if official unavailable), and 1-page English research statement
application.refereeNameHint: Please ask your referee to send the recommendation letter to pkuastronomy@pku.edu.cn before May 15, 2026
application.fundingUploadHint: Workshop participants who need funding support should state the reason when registering
application.successMessage: Thank you for registering. We will review your registration and get back to you.
application.dropzoneText: Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse
application.fileTooLarge: File size must be under 20 MB
application.invalidFilename: Filename does not match the required format
application.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
application.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
application.quotaSchool: Enrollment: summer school total up to 80 students
application.feeNote: No registration fee. Meals provided. Travel and accommodation are in principle at your own expense (advisors may provide funding).

referee.title: Recommendation Letter Upload
referee.subtitle: Please upload your recommendation letter for the applicant.
referee.successMessage: Thank you. The recommendation letter has been received.
referee.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired.
referee.alreadyUploaded: A recommendation letter has already been uploaded for this application.
